name: babysitter
description: Orchestrate complex, multi-step workflows with event-sourced state management, hook-based extensibility, and human-in-the-loop approval

interface.shortDescription: Run Babysitter orchestration flows from Codex
interface.longDescription: Babysitter adds orchestration entrypoints such as $call, $plan, and $resume, plus Codex lifecycle hooks that keep runs and workspace state in sync.
defaultPrompt: Use Babysitter to start a new orchestration run
Plan a Babysitter workflow before executing it
Resume the latest Babysitter run in this workspace
